tasks.task_description: Create SA Agent configuration file at .work-agent/agents/sa-agent/agent.json with prompt and tools from Amazon Q SA agent
Create SADashboard workspace component in src-ui/src/workspaces/SADashboard.tsx with calendar and meeting analysis features
Create backend API endpoints in src-server for SA-specific functionality (calendar, SFDC, email integration stubs)

description: Create SA Agent with custom UI workspace based on sa-automation project
context: Created SA Agent configuration with prompt from Amazon Q SA agent, Claude Sonnet model, and 4 quick prompts for daily triage, meeting prep, email summary, and SFDC updates. UI component set to 'sa-dashboard'.

Created SADashboard workspace component with calendar view, meeting analysis, and placeholder views for email and SFDC. Component fetches calendar events from backend API and supports meeting analysis.
Registered SADashboard component in workspace registry index.tsx

Added SA-specific backend API routes to voltagent-runtime.ts: /sa/calendar/today for fetching calendar events and /sa/meeting/analyze for meeting analysis. Currently using mock data that can be replaced with actual MCP server integration.
